steps.title: Resolve the sample difference
steps.content: The text says mineralogical differences between two small Ryugu samples may not indicate large compositional differences across the asteroid. That makes sense if minerals are not evenly distributed at the small scale.

steps.title: Choose the distribution word
steps.content: Choice A means ignored, choice B means repetitive or unnecessary, and choice C means continuing. None describes an even spatial pattern. The remaining choice means consistent throughout, which is the distribution the scientists say is unlikely. The answer is D.
